rationale: All 7 empirical checks ran clean at 75e82b52. (1) go build ./... exit 0. (2) go test -count=1 ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/complete ./internal/executor: all 'ok' (0.612s/5.283s/9.634s). (3) All 4 named discriminators pass with -count=1 -v: TestScanOrphanedClosedBeads_ErrorPreserving (4/4 subtests incl. the mixed-list parity case), TestPendingObligationPredicate (9/9 subtests incl. metadata-read-error, corrupt-entries, shape-invalid), TestCompleteRun_RegatesAlreadyClosedOrphan (PASS, exercises the already-closed-orphan regate path), TestFinalizeEpic_MergesOnlyWorktreeRealBranches (3/3 real-git subtests incl. the tag-shadow and dangling-symref cases). (4) AC8 pair holds exactly: git diff main | grep -c '^-.*rule as CompleteBead' = 1, grep -c 'rule as CompleteBead' in the file = 0 (comment-only removal confirmed empirically). (5) Negative fences all empty: no BranchExistsE, no show-ref in internal/, git diff main -- internal/gitutil/ empty (zero gitutil touch confirmed). (6) gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal printed nothing; go vet clean (exit 0) on all 3 packages; golangci-lint run on the 3 packages: '0 issues'. (7) git status --porcelain shows only the untracked reviews/ scratch dir I was instructed to write into — no tracked file was modified, worktree is clean. No REQUEST_CHANGES trigger fired.

findings.build_and_tests: ADDRESSED — go build exit 0; all 3 packages 'ok' with -count=1
findings.named_discriminators: ADDRESSED — all 4 tests and every subtest PASS with -count=1 -v
findings.negative_fences: ADDRESSED — BranchExistsE/show-ref greps empty; internal/gitutil/ diff vs main empty
findings.static_checks: ADDRESSED — gofmt clean, go vet clean, golangci-lint '0 issues'
findings.tree_cleanliness: ADDRESSED — git status --porcelain only shows the instructed reviews/ scratch dir; no tracked file touched
